live.title: Chelsea vs Port Vale - Quarter-Final - 4 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Chelsea welcome Port Vale to Stamford Bridge for a thrilling cup clash, as the Premier League giants face a spirited League One side. The Blues will look to assert their dominance and move one step closer to silverware, while Port Vale aim to produce an upset and make headlines with a memorable win. Can Chelsea’s quality prove too much, or will Port Vale defy the odds under the lights? Catch all action from the Emirates FA Cup 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

Can Chelsea’s quality prove too much, or will Port Vale defy the odds under the lights? Catch all action from the Emirates FA Cup 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

live.title: VfB Stuttgart vs Borussia Dortmund - MD 28 - 4 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: VfB Stuttgart host Borussia Dortmund in a high-profile clash with important implications near the top half of the table. Stuttgart aim to impose intensity and structure on home soil, while Dortmund bring attacking threat and experience in high‑pressure situations. With points crucial at this stage, this encounter promises pace, intensity, and edge‑of‑the‑seat moments. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

upcoming.title: Main Woh Aur Fuji
upcoming.shortDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures. Seven years later, beneath the shadow of Mount Fuji, they meet again carrying different lives, different scars, confronting a past that never truly left them. Can love survive its own history or shall it merely haunt them? Witness Lalit Prabhakar and Mrinmayee Godbole in a fresh, new-age romantic movie Main Woh Aur Fuji, streaming from 10th April, on Sony LIV.
